objectives.statement: Automate review-ready bi-weekly status mail generation.

team_commitments.commitment_summary: Deliver schema, workflow, and templates for PM cadence automation.

risk_summary.title: Transcript extraction quality may vary by source system.
risk_summary.mitigation: Preserve source references and require PM review on low-confidence notes.

inspect_adapt_actions.description: Review first two generated status mails for noise versus decision usefulness.
